name: Nebius Group N.V.

profile.description: Nebius Group (formerly Yandex N.V.) is an AI infrastructure company providing GPU cloud computing services. Q1 2026 revenue of $399M (up 684% YoY) with AI revenue at $390M. Targeting $7-9B annualized run-rate revenue for 2026 and $20-25B capex.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Track Record (3/3): Revenue surged 684% YoY to $399M in Q1 2026 with AI revenue of $390M [1]. Annualized run-rate reached $1.9B for Nebius AI. Complete transformation from Russian internet company to global AI infrastructure. AI Deployment (2/2): The entire business IS AI infrastructure — GPU cloud computing, Token Factory, and AI services generating $390M quarterly. Market Share (2/2): Rapidly growing AI cloud provider selling out capacity with multiple buyers competing for each GPU [1]. Product Pipeline (1/2): $7-9B ARR target for 2026, $20-25B capex for 2027 capacity. R&D Intensity (1/1): Massive AI infrastructure investment.

inspiration.label: WEAK
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (1/4): Generic AI infrastructure purpose with no distinctive mission beyond technology commercialization. Community Impact (0/2): No specific programs. Employee Retention (1/2): 1,543 employees in high-demand AI talent market. Insider Buying (1/2): Some insider activity.

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Revenue grew 684% YoY to $399M with 93.09% profit margin and 45% EBITDA margin [1]. Forward P/E of 718.87 is extremely elevated but PEG of 0.63 adjusts for extraordinary growth. D/E of 132.43% reflects infrastructure investment. ROE of 14.14% near target.

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (9/9): Nebius IS AI infrastructure — the company provides the GPU compute that AI companies need [1]. Cannot be disrupted by AI; demand grows with every AI advance. Pipeline grew 3.5x sequentially. AI Opportunity (1/1): 97.5% of revenue is AI-related ($390M of $399M) [1].

infinite_game.summary: Nebius transformed from Yandex (Russian internet) to a global AI infrastructure company — a dramatic existential pivot. The company's willingness to reinvent itself entirely is extraordinary, but the purpose beyond commercial AI infrastructure is unclear.

investment_thesis: Nebius AI revenue of $390M in Q1 2026 (up 684% YoY) with $1.9B ARR and targeting $7-9B run-rate for 2026 [1]. Pipeline grew 3.5x QoQ with capacity sold out. At PEG of 0.63 this is one of the fastest-growing AI infrastructure companies globally.
thesis_continued: Forward P/E of 718.87 and $20-25B capex guidance create enormous execution risk [1]. The transformation from Yandex carries operational and reputational risks. Competition from hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) with deeper pockets and larger customer bases.
key_catalysts: AI infrastructure demand continuing to outstrip supply, sustaining capacity sell-through
Revenue run-rate hitting $7-9B target as enterprise AI workloads scale
Token Factory and application-layer services expanding margins beyond raw GPU compute
key_risks: Forward P/E of 718.87 requires sustained 600%+ growth — any deceleration collapses the multiple
$20-25B capex commitment creating massive execution and financing risk
Hyperscaler competition (AWS, Azure, GCP) with larger scale and customer relationships
sources: Nebius Group Q1 2026 Results — Nebius Financials and Yahoo Finance, 2026
Yahoo Finance — NBIS Key Statistics, accessed June 2026
